meaning: adj.好发牢骚的,嘀咕不停的,烦躁的
examples: It would be less whiny and more appreciative.
'It's just three whiny gagno' was the fierce reply, in dialect.
Real men eat meat, regardless of what their know-it-all, whiny physician says every year at the end of the check-up.
But finding out a threat lurks inside your genome can put you in a whiny mood, anyway.
In the initial stages, as entrepreneurs are whiny about this or that, the closest sphere, the inner circle suffers alongside.
